caption: In a large, formal ballroom featuring recessed ceiling lighting and a large crystal chandelier, several men walk across a blue carpeted area. In the background, numerous guests are seated at tables with red cloths, observing the activity. One man wears a white traditional tunic and trousers, while another wears a blue garment and a third wears dark clothing. As the sequence progresses, the men move from left to right across the foreground. The man in white maintains a steady pace, while the man in blue follows closely behind him. The background remains static, with the seated audience watching the men pass by. There is no visible on-screen text or logos. The lighting is bright and warm, reflecting off the polished surfaces of the room.
